---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem or motivation

<!-- What problem does this solve, or what limitation does it address?
     "I want X" is less useful than "I can't do Y, which means I have to Z manually every time." -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- Describe what you'd like to see. Be as specific as you can about the interface, behaviour, and any
     constraints (e.g. must work without Docker, must not break existing forge.yaml files). -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What other approaches did you consider and why did you rule them out? -->

## Affected components

<!-- Which parts of Forge would this touch? -->
- [ ] `forge.yaml` schema
- [ ] Control plane API
- [ ] Scheduler
- [ ] `forge-agent`
- [ ] `forge-build-runner`
- [ ] Reverse proxy / Caddy integration
- [ ] Observability
- [ ] Terraform / Ansible infra
- [ ] Documentation

## Would you be willing to implement this?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to open a PR
- [ ] Yes, but I'd need guidance
- [ ] No, just proposing
